creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
In the meanwhile v2.9.9 has been release which contains a fix for a high rated CVE: https://github.com/owasp-modsecurity/ModSecurity/security/advisories/GHSA-859r-vvv8-rm8r

You can find the changes here: https://github.com/owasp-modsecurity/ModSecurity/releases/tag/v2.9.9

We'd really appreciate it, if this could land in the portstree soon! Thanks in advance!
